description_long: This office building is a rectangular, mid-rise structure with a flat roof and a uniform, grid-like facade. The exterior features rows of evenly spaced, rectangular windows on all visible sides, suggesting a modern and functional design. The building is surrounded by small, spherical trees or shrubs, which are symmetrically arranged along its perimeter, enhancing its urban setting. The facade appears to be made of concrete or stone panels, with subtle color variations between the sides. The main entrance is located on the front side, marked by a slightly recessed area and a set of double doors. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian architectural style.
description: A rectangular, mid-rise office building with a flat roof, grid-like windows, and symmetrical landscaping. The facade is minimalist and modern, with a recessed main entrance and no visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, grid windows, and symmetrical landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view with a clear view of the window grid and trees along the building's length.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the uniform window pattern and landscaping, with no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the window grid and trees.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal rows of rectangular windows evenly spaced across all facades.
